title: Snow Day
idea: Cozy snow-clearing ASMR. Each job a snow-covered surface (driveway, sidewalk, car roof, street) fills the screen; the player drags a tool across it and the snow erases layer-by-layer via a pixel mask, REVEALING the clean ground beneath. Clear the whole area to finish the job, earn coins, and upgrade the tool (shovel -> snow blower -> melt truck -> plow, each wider/faster), then take bigger and icier jobs.
origin: Manual 2-game batch 2026-06-07 (Tim, sourced from gardenofdreams.games 'Clear the Snow'). A reskin of the relic_restore reveal-and-upgrade engine to snow-clearing; seasonal winter cozy-casual, proven satisfying-clearing genre.
differentiation: Seasonal snow-clearing reveal with a tool ladder (shovel -> blower -> melt truck -> plow) and a job/location progression. Distinct from our other cleaners by the winter theme and the escalating equipment economy.
